description.en:
Hire farm hands and grow them into a capable workforce, managed from a full-screen panel (press K): Employees, Hire, College and an Overview dashboard.
New hands start near-useless: they wear equipment hard, work slowly, and can only handle basic tasks. They improve two ways. Experience builds automatically from the work they do, cutting the wear, fuel and time they cost you and promoting them through proficiency tiers. Training courses earn certificates — spraying is gated (no herbicide without the ticket), while combine, seeder, fertiliser and forage courses make a hand faster and gentler on the kit for that operation.
Hire from a monthly candidate pool and pay monthly wages. A well-trained hand who is underpaid may walk — decide who is worth keeping.
